message:
Add comptime type analysis and detection helpers

Leverages Zig comptime for zero-runtime-cost type analysis:

New comptime helpers in NativeType:
- isNativePrimitive(): Detects int/float/bool/string
- needsPyObjectWrapper(): Checks if PyObject* needed
- getPrintFormat(): Returns format specifier ({d}, {s}, etc)
- needsAllocator(): Recursively analyzes if type needs alloc
- isErrorUnion(): Checks if error handling needed

New FunctionSignature struct:
- analyze(): Comptime analysis of function requirements
- toZigSignature(): Generates optimal function signature
- Determines allocator need at compile time
- Zero runtime overhead

Benefits:
- All type checks done at compile time
- No runtime type inspection needed
- Optimal code generation
- Better error messages

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+# Simple test without print issues
+def multiply(a: int, b: int) -> int:
+    return a * b
